case_title: BINITA PATEL VS. MACYS WEST STORES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PATEL, BINITA AS TO DEFENDANT MACYS WEST STORES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICK THOMAN--ADMINISTRATIVE ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE: CORP. SVC. CO.) *(SIGNED)* SERVED MAY-16-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACYS WEST STORES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, BINITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MACYS WEST STORES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
